rationale: The citing article is a conceptual editorial for a MiM special issue that explicitly “summarizes the ten accepted papers,” so references to individual recent JMR papers are likely part of its core synthesis rather than incidental background. The cited paper’s topic (privacy consent, targeted vs. untargeted ads, repeat-ad wearout, and consumer harm/profit trade-offs) directly matches the editorial’s mitigation scope around harmful marketing consequences. Given this thematic fit and exact DOI match (10.1177/00222437221140052), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
